---
title: "Project 1: Step 2"
author: Rayan Tahir
format: html
editor: visual
theme: superhero
error: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output: false
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2021-01-26')
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2021, week = 5)
plastics <- tuesdata$plastics
```

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| output: false
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
```

**Dominant Plastic Type by Country**

```{r}
find_max <- function(x) {
  names(x)[x == max(x, na.rm = TRUE)][1] 
}

dominant_plastic <- function(data) {
  plastic_cols <- 
    c(
    "empty", 
    "hdpe", 
    "ldpe", 
    "o", 
    "pet", 
    "pp", 
    "ps", 
    "pvc")
  dominant <- apply(
    select(data, all_of(plastic_cols)), 
    1,
    FUN = find_max
  )
  return(dominant)
}
```

```{r}
dominant_plastic(plastics)
```
